explicitDate.description: Whether the date_from and date_to should be used verbatim. Disables rounding to the start and end of period.

key.description: The key should be the flag ID

operator.description: Only flag_evaluates_to operator is allowed for flag dependencies

value.description: The value can be true, false, or a variant name

randomOrder.description: Use random ordering instead of timestamp DESC. Useful for representative sampling to avoid recency bias.
